# Repository Skills

These skills capture repository-specific implementation and maintenance guidance for the `jooservices/laravel-controller` package.

- `repo-quality-foundation`: baseline task expectations
- `code-style-and-conventions`: repository-native PHP and docs style
- `architecture-and-design-principles`: module ownership and public API boundaries
- `docs-and-readme-sync`: documentation structure and sync rules
- `ci-and-release`: workflow, release, and automation expectations
